title: stenogyne mollissima
intro: Stenogyne mollissima, also known as Hawaiian mountain mint, is a type of flowering plant native to Hawaii and other Pacific island regions. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from digestive issues, reduced fever, and improved respiratory health. In traditional Hawaiian medicine, Stenogyne mollissima is often prepared as a tea or infused in oils, and it may also be used in salves and topical creams for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
